turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I need to reschedule my sleep study. I had it booked for Saturday but I forgot I have an office event that weekend.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No worries. Could I have your name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Found it. Sleep study this Saturday night. Next available Saturday after that would be in two weeks. Would that work?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Rescheduled to two weeks from this Saturday. Same time, 9 PM arrival. SMS with updated date coming shortly.
